params.name: King Menkaure & Queen
params.description:
On Aug 24, 2600 BC, the artisans completed the statue of King Menkaure & Queen.
This statue was built during the Fourth Dynasty of ancient Egypt and is a typical imperial statue of that era. The statue depicts a solemn pharaoh couple standing side by side, with their bodies vertical to the ground, adhering to the characteristic Frontalism style of Egyptian art, exhibiting the pharaoh's majesty, which makes it a valuable artifact with both artistic and historical value.
